title: Huawei AR730 Multi-WAN router
category: Huawei / LAN networks / Routers and Firewalls
description: The Huawei AR730 features 8x LAN ports with a speed of 1 Gbps and three combo ETH / SFP ports with a speed of 1 Gbps , configurable as LAN / WAN , along with 1x SFP+ 10 Gbps WAN . The equipment includes two USB 2.0 ports, two SIC slots for expansion cards, and an RJ45 port for console connection The Huawei NetEngine AR series routers represent a new generation of routing devices, offering SD-WAN functionality, routing, switching, VPN, and much more Device Rack mounts (6) Screws Power cable 230 V Ground cable (4) Rubber feets
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces WAN speed (2) 1G Combo + (1) SFP+ Multiple WAN Yes LAN speed (8) 10/100/1000Mbps + (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Combo Gigabit LAN Yes Optical interfaces (3) 1000Mbps Combo + (1) 10Gbps Serial port RJ45 Power Power type Mains power (230V) Max. power consumption [W] 33 Physical characteristics Design On the wall, Desktop, Rackmount Fans Yes Chassis design Metal Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 45 Width [mm] 442 Height [mm] 44 Depth [mm] 220 Hardware RAM [MB] 4096
